'''鈭歽-j-m''' ('''shayajam''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:mythologize|mythologize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-j-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mythologize|mythologize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歽-j-m
|-
! Lemma
| shayajam
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyajam|thiyajam]] || [[word:jiyajam|jiyajam]] || [[word:shiyajam|shiyajam]] || [[word:kiyajam|kiyajam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyajam|thuthuyajam]] || [[word:jujuyajam|jujuyajam]] || [[word:shushuyajam|shushuyajam]] || [[word:kukuyajam|kukuyajam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuyajam|thuyajam]] || [[word:juyajam|juyajam]] || [[word:shuyajam|shuyajam]] || [[word:kuyajam|kuyajam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuyajam|thuyajam]] || [[word:juyajam|juyajam]] || [[word:shuyajam|shuyajam]] || [[word:kuyajam|kuyajam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theyajam|theyajam]] || [[word:jeyajam|jeyajam]] || [[word:sheyajam|sheyajam]] || [[word:keyajam|keyajam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoyajam|thothoyajam]] || [[word:jojoyajam|jojoyajam]] || [[word:shoshoyajam|shoshoyajam]] || [[word:kokoyajam|kokoyajam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoyajam|thoyajam]] || [[word:joyajam|joyajam]] || [[word:shoyajam|shoyajam]] || [[word:koyajam|koyajam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyajam|thoyajam]] || [[word:joyajam|joyajam]] || [[word:shoyajam|shoyajam]] || [[word:koyajam|koyajam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙yajam|th忙yajam]] || [[word:j忙yajam|j忙yajam]] || [[word:sh忙yajam|sh忙yajam]] || [[word:k忙yajam|k忙yajam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathayajam|thathayajam]] || [[word:jajayajam|jajayajam]] || [[word:shashayajam|shashayajam]] || [[word:kakayajam|kakayajam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayajam|thayajam]] || [[word:jayajam|jayajam]] || [[word:shayajam|shayajam]] || [[word:kayajam|kayajam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayajam|thayajam]] || [[word:jayajam|jayajam]] || [[word:shayajam|shayajam]] || [[word:kayajam|kayajam]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shayajam|shayajam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshayajam|goshayajam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishayajam|gokishayajam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shayajamn眉|shayajamn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshayajamnkn眉|goshayajamnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishayajamn眉|gokishayajamn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shayajamsh毛|shayajamsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshayajamnksh毛|goshayajamnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishayajamsh毛|gokishayajamsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayajamro|shayajamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayajamnkro|goshayajamnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayajamro|gokishayajamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shayajamu|shayajamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayajamnkmu|goshayajamnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayajamu|gokishayajamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shayajamsher|shayajamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshayajamnksher|goshayajamnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishayajamsher|gokishayajamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shayajamng|shayajamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshayajamnkng|goshayajamnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishayajamng|gokishayajamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shayajamya|shayajamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshayajamnkya|goshayajamnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishayajamya|gokishayajamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shayajamyam|shayajamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshayajamnkyam|goshayajamnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishayajamyam|gokishayajamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayajamn眉sh毛|shayajamn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayajamnkn眉sh毛|goshayajamnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayajamn眉sh毛|gokishayajamn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayajamn眉ro|shayajamn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayajamnkn眉ro|goshayajamnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayajamn眉ro|gokishayajamn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayajamn眉mu|shayajamn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayajamnkn眉mu|goshayajamnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayajamn眉mu|gokishayajamn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayajamsh毛n眉|shayajamsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayajamnksh毛n眉|goshayajamnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayajamsh毛n眉|gokishayajamsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayajamsh毛ro|shayajamsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayajamnksh毛ro|goshayajamnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayajamsh毛ro|gokishayajamsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayajamsh毛mu|shayajamsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayajamnksh毛mu|goshayajamnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayajamsh毛mu|gokishayajamsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayajamron眉|shayajamron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayajamnkron眉|goshayajamnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayajamron眉|gokishayajamron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayajamrosh毛|shayajamrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayajamnkrosh毛|goshayajamnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayajamrosh毛|gokishayajamrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayajamromu|shayajamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayajamnkromu|goshayajamnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayajamromu|gokishayajamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayajamun眉|shayajamun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayajamnkmun眉|goshayajamnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayajamun眉|gokishayajamun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayajamush毛|shayajamush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayajamnkmush毛|goshayajamnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayajamush毛|gokishayajamush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayajamuro|shayajamuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayajamnkmuro|goshayajamnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayajamuro|gokishayajamuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
